positive: A vibrant, abstract composition featuring a stylized constellation of cosmic elements, including glowing nebulas, swirling galactic dust clouds, and minimalist geometric stellar patterns. The main subject is a central, ethereal nebula rendered in deep indigos, teals, and vibrant magentas, contrasting sharply with scattered golden and silver stardust. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centrally focused, designed as a seamless repeating pattern suitable for apparel. Use a clean, graphic vector art style combined with hyper-detailed cosmic elements. The lighting should emanate softly from the nebulae itself, creating high contrast and strong silhouettes against a deep, void-like background. Print-friendly, high-resolution, clean lines, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, noise, low resolution, grain, messy, poor anatomy, multiple subjects, copyright, celebrity
